/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-m3 -Wl,--gc-sections --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-m3 -Wl,--gc-sections --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -T/home/chinhtran/Learning/Embedded/FreeRTOS/STM32/STM32F103C8TX_FLASH.ld "CMakeFiles/stm32f103c8-freertos-template.elf.dir/Core/Src/main.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/stm32f103c8-freertos-template.elf.dir/App/Src/app_main.c.obj" -o stm32f103c8-freertos-template.elf
